en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER. A PSALM OF DAVID. Blessed is the one who considers the poor! In the day of trouble the LORD delivers him;
zh: 關懷窮乏人的有福了； 在遭難的日子，耶和華必救他。

en: the LORD protects him and keeps him alive; he is called blessed in the land; you do not give him up to the will of his enemies.
zh: 耶和華要保護他，使他生存； 他在地上要稱為有福的； 求你不要照著他敵人的心願把他交給他們。

en: The LORD sustains him on his sickbed; in his illness you restore him to full health.
zh: 他患病在床，耶和華必扶持他； 在病榻中你使他恢復健康。

en: As for me, I said, "O LORD, be gracious to me; heal me, for I have sinned against you!"
zh: 至於我，我曾說：“耶和華啊！求你恩待我； 求你醫治我，因為我得罪了你。”

en: My enemies say of me in malice, "When will he die and his name perish?"
zh: 我的仇敵用惡毒的話中傷我，說： “他甚麼時候死呢？他的名字甚麼時候消滅呢？”

en: And when one comes to see me, he utters empty words, while his heart gathers iniquity; when he goes out, he tells it abroad.
zh: 即使他來看我，說的也是假話； 他把奸詐積存在心裡， 走到外面才說出來。

en: All who hate me whisper together about me; they imagine the worst for me.
zh: 所有憎恨我的人，都交頭接耳地議論我； 他們設惡計要害我，說：

en: They say, "A deadly thing is poured out on him; he will not rise again from where he lies."
zh: “有惡疾臨到他身上； 他既然躺下了，就必一病不起。”

en: Even my close friend in whom I trusted, who ate my bread, has lifted his heel against me.
zh: 連我信任的密友， 就是那吃我飯的， 也用腳踢我。

en: But you, O LORD, be gracious to me, and raise me up, that I may repay them!
zh: 至於你，耶和華啊！求你恩待我， 使我康復起來，好報復他們。

en: By this I know that you delight in me: my enemy will not shout in triumph over me.
zh: 因此我就知道你喜愛我， 因為我的仇敵不能向我歡呼誇勝。

en: But you have upheld me because of my integrity, and set me in your presence forever.
zh: 至於我，你因為我正直，就扶持我； 你使我永遠站在你面前。

en: Blessed be the LORD, the God of Israel, from everlasting to everlasting! Amen and Amen.
zh: 耶和華以色列的 神是應當稱頌的， 從永遠直到永遠。 阿們，阿們。
